short_summary: Energy deal progress, no local impact
rationale: Iran deal momentum continues with potential indirect energy price benefit for Portugal; no other events of direct relevance.

top_events.title: Iran deal close; Hormuz reopening tied to agreement
top_events.summary: US-Iran deal nearing could lower global energy prices, offering modest relief to Portugal's cost of living and energy-dependent economy.

top_events.title: Warner Bros $111bn sale to Paramount approved
top_events.summary: Major US media merger approved; negligible direct impact on Portugal beyond minor cultural/streaming market shifts.

top_events.title: Switzerland votes on population cap at 10 million
top_events.summary: Swiss referendum on capping population could affect EU migration dynamics marginally; very indirect relevance to Portugal.
